title: AI-Enabled Web Hosting
description: Revolutionary hosting which includes your own dedicated AI assistant that lets you manage your website by simply talking to it in plain English. No technical skills required — just tell your site what you want changed and your personal agent handles the rest.
features: Update your website by talking to it in plain English
Your own dedicated AI assistant who understands your business and your website
Preview and approve changes before they go live
targetAudience: Small business owners who want hands-off management
Non-technical users who need website updates
Busy professionals without time for manual updates
body: Our AI-Enabled hosting is a game-changer for small business owners. Instead of learning complicated website tools or hiring a developer for every small change, simply tell your website what you want in plain English. Want to update your hours? Add a new menu item? Change your homepage banner? Add a new image? Just say it and your dedicated AI assistant makes it happen.
note: Includes free website migration; requires a minimum 12-month commitment.
